---
title: "Slide"
format: html
---

# Isolating multiple autofluorescences

- We can extend this same ability to isolate cells based on normalized spectral signatures to unstained controls in an automated fashion

- As the return file is fully .fcs standard compliant, they can be used downstream for unmixing. 

- Unlike approaches use AF explorer, or dimensionality visualized islands, the isolated cells share autofluorescence signature, only differing in brightness.
